Telehealth across Florida

Medical care that
starts with you

Direct access to a licensed provider who knows your history, your goals, and your health — not just your chart. Cash pay, no insurance hassles, same-week appointments.

Same-Week Appointments

HIPAA-Compliant Portal

One Consistent Provider

What We Offer

Healthcare built around your needs

Three focused services designed around continuity of care, honest evaluation, and real provider access.

Primary Care

Routine visits, chronic condition management, and medication oversight — all from a provider who knows your full history.

Learn more

Weight Loss

Clinically supervised weight management with GLP-1 evaluation, personalized plans, and ongoing monitoring.

Learn more

TRT Evaluation

Lab-driven testosterone assessment with honest evaluation — focused on your health, not a sales pitch.

Learn more
Why MBS Medical

Care that's different by design

We built this practice around what healthcare should feel like — personal, straightforward, and focused on you.

One provider, every visit

No rotating staff. You see the same provider who knows your history, medications, and goals.

No insurance red tape

Cash pay means no surprise bills, no prior authorizations, and no denied claims.

Telehealth across Florida

Quality care from wherever you are. No waiting rooms, no commute, no wasted time.

Goal-oriented care plans

Your care plan evolves with you. We track progress, adjust treatments, and keep your goals front and center.

Your Care Team

Experienced providers behind your care

A military-trained PA-C backed by two board-certified physicians with decades of clinical experience.

David, PA-C

Founder & Primary Provider

12 years U.S. Army service

Dr. Eric Folkens, MD

Supervising Physician

34+ years family medicine

Dr. Mark Dawson, MD

Supervising Physician

30+ years gastroenterology

Meet the full team

Book a visit and connect with a provider who takes the time to understand your health. Same-week availability.
